ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the sports club */,
  "enrolled_members" INTEGER /* Number of enrolled members in the club */,
  "club_type" TEXT /* Type of sports club (e.g., professional, amateur, school) */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the club was founded */,
  "address" TEXT /* Club address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the club is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the club is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the club is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the club's location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the club */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "club_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club administrator */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the administrator */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., president, secretary, treasurer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_club_administrators_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member (e.g., athlete, coach, staff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medals" (
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal count entry */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Number of gold medals won */,
  "silver" INTEGER /* Number of silver medals won */,
  "bronze" INTEGER /* Number of bronze medals won */,
  "total_medals" INTEGER /* Total number of medals won */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition */,
  "medal_date" TEXT /* Date when the medal was awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the competition took place */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the competition was held */,
  "organizing_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club organizing the competition */,
  "competition_type" TEXT /* Type of competition (e.g., national, international, regional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitions_organizing_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizing_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "federation_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each federation official */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the official */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., president, secretary, treasurer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data analyst */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the analyst */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., senior analyst, junior analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)
